codeReview.summary: Pass. This fix closes the prior VAL-UX-053 gap: Settings now renders an About section with the package.json version string and Privacy policy / Terms of service rows, and the regression suite explicitly presses each link row and verifies the exact https://enbox.org/privacy and https://enbox.org/terms targets.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker marked `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true`, but the transcript skeleton does not show the required `.factory/library/architecture.md` read and shows the first settings test run before any file edits, then code edits, then the green rerun. The mobile-feature-worker skill currently relies on self-report for its honesty gate, so scrutiny had to infer the deviation from transcript order.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/home/liran/src/enboxorg/mobile/.factory/skills/mobile-feature-worker/SKILL.md:26-36,66-73` requires reading at least `architecture.md` and observing a red test before implementation. In `/home/liran/.factory/missions/08245e86-9e3a-49bb-ba11-c4ec0804b327/worker-transcripts.jsonl` for session `3f6c9c35-d683-4c1d-a6f7-fd935078b2da`, the skeleton contains reads for mission.md / validation-contract.md / AGENTS.md but no `architecture.md` read, and its first `bun run test -- --testPathPattern 'settings'` entry appears before the first `Edit` entry.

summary: Review passed. The settings fix now exposes the required About/version and Privacy/Terms rows, and committed Jest coverage verifies both exact external URLs, resolving the prior blocking VAL-UX-053 failure.
